project.name: komga-reader
project.description: Native Android E-Ink reader app (Kotlin / Jetpack Compose) for Onyx Boox devices, unifying three reading modes (paged comic, webtoon scroll, EPUB/novel reflow) behind a source-agnostic architecture (Komga REST, OPDS, runtime plugins) and MuPDF/crengine render engines, with E-Ink-specific refresh handling and a modular, swappable UI. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.

nodes.name: .gitlab-ci.yml
nodes.summary: GitLab CI pipeline for the Komga-Reader integration-test suite with three stages: build (assembleDebug + androidTest APK), unit (gradle test), and integration (boots Komga fixtures + a headless KVM emulator and runs connectedDebugAndroidTest for the com.komgareader.app.ci package).
nodes.languageNotes: The integration stage requires a shell-executor runner with Docker + /dev/kvm + Android SDK (tag android-kvm), using before_script/after_script for fixture and emulator lifecycle.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Build job that assembles the debug APK and the debug androidTest APK via Gradle, exporting them as one-day artifacts for the integration stage.

nodes.name: unit
nodes.summary: Unit-test job running the full Gradle `test` task and archiving the HTML test reports for one week.

nodes.name: integration
nodes.summary: Integration job that brings up Komga fixtures and a headless KVM emulator, runs the instrumented com.komgareader.app.ci test package via connectedDebugAndroidTest, then tears the environment back down.

nodes.name: build.gradle.kts
nodes.summary: Gradle build configuration for the :app module: applies Android application/Kotlin/Compose/KSP/Hilt plugins, wires all internal modules (data, domain, ui-api, source-*, render-*, plugin-*, eink-onyx, guided-view) and the Compose/Hilt/Coil/test dependency stack, and sets the HiltTestRunner as the instrumentation runner.
nodes.languageNotes: Kotlin DSL Gradle script using a version catalog (libs.*) and project(":module") dependencies that encode the enforced module DAG.

nodes.name: AndroidManifest.xml
nodes.summary: Main app manifest declaring INTERNET and plugin install/delete/query-all-packages permissions, the MainActivity launcher, KomgaReaderApp, and the plugin install receiver.

nodes.name: Bitter-OFL.txt
nodes.summary: SIL Open Font License (v1.1) text for the bundled Bitter Pro font, including the copyright attribution and full license terms.

nodes.name: Literata-OFL.txt
nodes.summary: SIL Open Font License (OFL 1.1) text for the bundled Literata font used in the EPUB/novel reflow reader.

nodes.name: hyph-de-1996.pattern
nodes.summary: German (1996 reform orthography) TeX-style hyphenation pattern dictionary consumed by the crengine reflow engine for justified line-breaking in the novel reader.
nodes.languageNotes: TeX/Liang hyphenation patterns: numeric digits between letters encode allowed/forbidden break points; ~35k entries make this a large generated data asset, not hand-edited code.

nodes.summary: US-English TeX-style hyphenation pattern dictionary consumed by the crengine reflow engine for justified line-breaking in the novel reader.
nodes.languageNotes: TeX/Liang hyphenation patterns (~5k entries); a generated data asset paired with the German pattern file for per-language word-breaking.

nodes.name: ColorPipelineTransformation.kt
nodes.summary: Coil image Transformation that applies the full E-Ink color pixel pipeline (saturation/contrast/gamma/dither) to decoded reader page bitmaps, with a profile-derived cache key so results are cached per image and profile.
nodes.languageNotes: Coil Transformation contract: cacheKey encodes all ColorProfile fields so equal profiles share cache entries; only attached to page requests, never covers.

nodes.name: ColorPipelineTransformation
nodes.summary: Coil Transformation that copies the bitmap to ARGB_8888, runs the domain applyPixelPipeline over its pixels for the given ColorProfile, and writes them back.

nodes.name: ActiveSource.kt
nodes.summary: The source-agnostic boundary for ViewModels: resolves configured connections as BrowsableSource/CollectionSyncSource by sourceId (or aggregated), never exposing concrete source types, enforcing the Seam A integration rule.
nodes.languageNotes: Open class so unit tests can supply a fixed source without a network-bound implementation; all source resolution flows through registration.sync over the configured servers.

nodes.name: ActiveSource

nodes.name: SourceCoverFetcher

nodes.name: SourceImage.kt
nodes.summary: Coil model data class identifying a source-loaded page image by sourceId, book remote id, and 1-based page number.

nodes.name: SourcePageFetcher
nodes.summary: Coil Fetcher (with nested Factory) that wraps loadPageBytes output into a Coil SourceResult for a SourceImage model.

nodes.name: CollectionSyncManager.kt
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the source-agnostic bidirectional sync of user collections — push of canonical members, pull-overwrite, server discovery, vanished detection, and title healing — delegating pure planning to planCollectionSync.
nodes.languageNotes: Holds no HTTP details (those live in source impls); resolves sources via injected lambdas, uses a Mutex to serialize full/pull syncs, and applies last-write-wins per (collection, source) link.

nodes.languageNotes: Shared by SyncCoordinator and the thin PluginsViewModel; exposes StateFlows for each plugin category and gates network repo fetches behind a Mutex (local scans are network-free).

nodes.name: installedEntriesOf
nodes.summary: Pure mapping of discovered source/preset/language/reader-preset/UI-pack plugins to the agnostic InstalledEntry view used by row filtering.

nodes.name: PluginCatalog
nodes.summary: Singleton that owns plugin discovery StateFlows and implements scanLocal(), fetchRepos(), install(), and repo management against PluginHost, the repo client, and the installer.

nodes.name: PluginServerConfig.kt
nodes.summary: Pure helper that builds a ServerConfig for a confirmed plugin source, centralizing the reserved wiring keys __pkg/__entry/__sig (TOFU pin) so PluginsViewModel and SettingsViewModel stay DRY.

nodes.name: SourceRegistration.kt
nodes.summary: Wiring-layer service that registers active sources from ServerConfig into the SourceManager (Komga/OPDS/plugin APK), keeping concrete source types confined here while ViewModels see only BrowsableSource.
nodes.languageNotes: Idempotent and atomic sync(): only newly added sources are registered and removed ones unregistered (no churn), guarded by a synchronized lock to avoid races with concurrent Coil fetchers.

nodes.name: SourceRegistration
nodes.summary: Singleton that builds BrowsableSource instances per ServerConfig kind and exposes sync(), sourceIdOf(), activate(), and active-id queries, dispatching plugin sources through PluginHost with the TOFU signature pin.

nodes.name: SyncCoordinator.kt
nodes.summary: The single place for sync/discovery decisions: call sites only report events (app start, server changed, manual reload, tab entered) while this class decides what to sync, delegating to CollectionSyncManager and PluginCatalog.
nodes.languageNotes: onAppStart is latch-protected (loads once per launch, battery-friendly on E-Ink); aggressive full sync on tab entry is gated by display mode via aggressiveSyncAllowed.

nodes.name: SyncCoordinator
nodes.summary: Singleton exposing onAppStart(), onServerChanged(), onManualReload(), onPluginsTabResumed(), and onCollectionsTabEntered(), each best-effort delegating to the injected sync/scan/fetch lambdas.

nodes.name: SyncGating.kt
nodes.summary: Pure predicate aggressiveSyncAllowed deciding whether full sync may run on every tab open — true only on non-E-Ink (LCD/smartphone) devices to save battery and avoid E-Ink motion.

nodes.name: ApplicationScope.kt
nodes.summary: Hilt qualifier annotation distinguishing the app-wide CoroutineScope (provided by AppModule.applicationScope) from other injectable scopes.

nodes.name: AppModule.kt
nodes.summary: Hilt SingletonComponent module providing app-wide dependencies: the SourceManager registry, Coil ImageLoader with source-seam fetchers, MuPDF/crengine render factories, the application CoroutineScope, PluginHost, and the HW-gated EinkController.
nodes.languageNotes: EinkController provider is hardware-gated on Build.MANUFACTURER == ONYX, falling back to NoOpEinkController off-device so development never crashes; render factories sit behind DocumentFactory interfaces (DIP, Seam B).

nodes.name: AppModule
nodes.summary: Dagger/Hilt object module with @Provides factories for SourceManager, ImageLoader, NovelProgressMapper, DocumentFactory, ReflowableDocumentFactory, the application scope, PluginHost, and EinkController.

nodes.name: HardwareButtons.kt
nodes.summary: Singleton HardwareButtonBus distributing physical button events (volume keys = page turn) to the active reader via a SharedFlow.

nodes.name: NoOpEinkController.kt
nodes.summary: Fallback EinkController for non-Boox devices/emulator: no E-Ink refresh control, just forwards button events from the bus, advertising color/invert-capable non-E-Ink capabilities.

nodes.name: NoOpEinkController
nodes.summary: EinkController implementation with no-op refresh/contrast/invert and button events sourced from HardwareButtonBus, used off Onyx hardware.

nodes.name: LanguageResolver.kt
nodes.summary: Resolves a stored language code into active Strings: built-in de/en first, else an installed language plugin via MapBackedStrings with EN fallback, never null — mirroring the StubSource default principle.

nodes.name: Localization.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the LocalStrings static CompositionLocal supplying the currently active Strings to every Composable, defaulting to German.

nodes.name: MapBackedStrings.kt
nodes.summary: Strings implementation backed by a runtime override map (language plugin), reading each member from the overrides and falling back to a built-in (usually StringsEn), with placeholder interpolation for parameterized strings.
nodes.languageNotes: Generated from Strings.kt: every interface member must be overridden here so the compiler enforces completeness, preventing silent drift when new strings are added.

nodes.name: MapBackedStrings
nodes.summary: Strings implementation that reads each property/function from an overrides map keyed by member name, falling back to a provided Strings instance and interpolating placeholders in function templates.

nodes.name: Strings.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the Strings interface (all visible UI text as type-safe keys) plus the StringsDe and StringsEn built-in implementations and helpers for localizing series status and content type.
nodes.languageNotes: Interface-driven i18n with compile-time parity: German and English objects must implement every member, and helper extensions localize raw source enum values rather than displaying them directly.

nodes.name: StringsDe
nodes.summary: German implementation of the Strings interface providing localized values for every UI text key.

nodes.name: StringsEn
nodes.summary: English implementation of the Strings interface, also the safe fallback for partial language plugins.

nodes.name: KomgaReaderApp.kt

nodes.languageNotes: @HiltAndroidApp marks the DI root for the whole app.

nodes.name: KomgaReaderApp

nodes.name: MainActivity

nodes.name: SettingsSections.kt

nodes.name: SettingsViewModel

nodes.name: CollectionDao.kt
nodes.summary: Room DAO for user collections, their members, and per-source sync links, with reactive observers, CRUD queries, and an atomic transactional member-replace helper.
nodes.languageNotes: Kotlin Room @Dao interface mixing @Query/@Insert with a default @Transaction method (replaceMembers) for atomic member replacement.

nodes.name: CollectionEntities.kt
nodes.summary: Room @Entity data classes for collections, their ordered members (source-agnostic via sourceId/remoteId), and per-source sync links carrying status/dirty/updatedAt.

nodes.name: ColorProfileDao.kt

nodes.name: ReadProgressDao.kt
nodes.summary: Room DAO for per-book paged reading progress, exposing reactive observation, get by id, the dirty backlog for sync, put, and mark-clean.

nodes.name: SeriesOverrideDao.kt
nodes.summary: Room DAO for manual per-series content-type overrides, keyed source-agnostically by sourceId and series remote id.

nodes.name: ServerDao.kt
nodes.summary: Room DAO for configured server connections, observing all rows, saving (replace), querying the max rowid for id assignment, and deleting individual or all servers.

nodes.name: SettingsDao.kt
nodes.summary: Room DAO for the key-value settings table, with reactive observation of a value by key, upsert, and delete.

nodes.name: ShelfDao.kt

nodes.name: PluginRepoDefaults.kt
nodes.summary: Constants object holding the official plugin repository name and its GitHub-raw repo.json URL, kept as a constant rather than a DB seed for trivial swapping.

nodes.name: RepoModels.kt
nodes.summary: Data model definitions for the plugin repo subsystem: PluginKind/InstallState enums and serializable RepoIndex/RepoPluginEntry plus the merged display-ready BrowsableEntry.

nodes.name: RepoStore.kt
nodes.summary: Manages active plugin repo sources, reactively combining the toggleable official repo constant with user-added repos from the DAO and exposing add/remove/rename/toggle operations.

nodes.name: UiPackParser.kt
nodes.summary: Pure org.json parser for a UI-pack plugin's ui_pack.json into a domain UiPackSpec, ABI-gating then tolerantly extracting shell navStyle, icon remaps, and a full theme spec (8 color roles, corner radius, typography) with sentinel-guarded numeric parsing.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Int.MIN_VALUE/isFinite sentinels to distinguish missing/unparseable numbers from a genuine zero, avoiding silent org.json coercion bugs.

nodes.name: RoomCollectionRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed implementation of the domain CollectionRepository, mapping entities to domain models, atomically replacing members, maintaining per-source sync links, and cleaning up collections when a source is removed.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines two Flows (collections + members) into reactive UserCollection lists; removeSource only deletes collections left fully empty after clearing a source's members/links.

nodes.name: DownloadManager
nodes.summary: Hilt singleton that persists downloaded book bytes to SAF or internal storage, records them in the download repository, and reads/deletes local bytes, implementing LocalBookBytes.

nodes.name: store
nodes.summary: Suspend function that writes book bytes to the configured location and records the resulting download (path, format, metadata) in the download repository.

nodes.name: storeBytes
nodes.summary: Writes bytes either into a SAF tree URI via DocumentFile (overwriting any existing file) or falls back to internal app storage, returning the resulting local path/URI.

nodes.name: RoomCollectionRepository
nodes.summary: CollectionRepository implementation over CollectionDao that maps Room entities to domain collection models, manages ordered members and per-source sync links, and prunes collections emptied by source removal.

nodes.name: setMembers
nodes.summary: Atomically replaces a collection's ordered members and upserts a dirty sync link for each distinct source involved, marking it for a later server push.

nodes.name: removeSource
nodes.summary: Clears a source's collection members and sync links, then deletes only those touched collections that have become completely empty.

nodes.name: ColorPresetImporter
nodes.summary: Pure object converting a plugin ColorPresetSpec to a domain ColorProfile, with an ABI/finite-value-gating toProfileOrNull and a clamping toProfile.

nodes.name: parseLanguageSpec
nodes.summary: Parses a single language JSON object into a LanguageSpec, returning null on malformed input or missing code/name/strings and inheriting the manifest ABI when absent.

nodes.name: parseReaderPresetSpecs
nodes.summary: Parses a JSON array of named reader-preset entries into ReaderPreset objects, skipping entries without a name and building tolerant partial settings overrides.

nodes.name: parseUiPackSpec
nodes.summary: ABI-gated pure parser of a UI-pack ui_pack.json into a UiPackSpec, extracting optional shell navStyle, icon remap map, and a full theme spec with sentinel-guarded corner radius, typography, and 8 color roles for light/dark.

nodes.name: visibleRows
nodes.summary: Applies type-chip and search filtering to installed and discovered plugin rows, hiding already-installed discovered entries (except updates) and computing whether a section divider should show.

nodes.name: PluginRepoClient
nodes.summary: OkHttp client wrapper exposing suspend fetchIndex (returns index text or null) and download (saves an APK to disk, deleting partial files on error); pure IO on Dispatchers.IO.

nodes.name: RepoStore
nodes.summary: Manages active plugin repo sources by combining the toggleable official repo constant with user-added repos from the DAO, plus add/remove/rename/toggle operations; pure management, no networking.

nodes.name: RoomColorProfileRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed implementation of the domain ColorProfileRepository, exposing color profiles and the active-profile pointer as Flows and guarding built-in profiles against mutation.

nodes.name: RoomColorProfileRepository
nodes.summary: Implements ColorProfileRepository over a Room DAO; the active-profile pointer is injected as a Flow plus setter so the repo keeps a single responsibility.

nodes.name: RoomDownloadRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed DownloadRepository persisting offline-downloaded books and mapping between DownloadEntity rows and the domain DownloadedBook model.

nodes.name: RoomDownloadRepository
nodes.summary: Implements DownloadRepository over a DownloadDao, exposing a Flow of downloaded books and CRUD operations keyed by remote book id.

nodes.name: RoomNovelProgressRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed NovelProgressRepository tracking EPUB/novel reading position (anchor + fraction) per source and book, with dirty flags for offline-first sync.

nodes.name: RoomNovelProgressRepository
nodes.summary: Persists novel reading progress via a NovelProgressDao, coercing the fraction into [0,1], stamping updatedAt, and exposing dirty entries for the sync queue.

nodes.name: RoomReadProgressRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed ReadProgressRepository for paged/comic reading progress, merging page numbers without regress and marking entries dirty for the offline-first sync queue.

nodes.name: RoomReadProgressRepository
nodes.summary: Implements ReadProgressRepository, taking the max of new and stored page to avoid regress, OR-ing the completed flag, and exposing dirty entries to sync.

nodes.name: RoomSeriesOverrideRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed SeriesOverrideRepository storing per-series content-type overrides as enum names, used by the deterministic viewer-type resolution.

nodes.name: RoomSeriesOverrideRepository
nodes.summary: Implements SeriesOverrideRepository over a DAO, parsing ContentType enum names defensively and deleting the override when the type is null.

nodes.name: RoomServerRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed ServerRepository persisting multiple mixed server connections (Komga/OPDS/plugin) with AES/GCM-encrypted credential and extras blobs that survive app updates.
nodes.languageNotes: Credentials and the extras map are Keystore-encrypted as ciphertext/IV blob columns; the extras Map<String,String> is JSON-serialized before encryption.

nodes.name: RoomServerRepository
nodes.summary: Implements ServerRepository for N simultaneous server configs, encrypting apiKey/password/extras via KeystoreCredentialStore and decrypting them back on read with safe fallbacks.

nodes.name: RoomSettingsRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room key-value SettingsRepository exposing every app setting (theme, display/shell mode, novel typography, refresh, UI pack, etc.) as Flows with sensible E-Ink defaults plus typed setters.
nodes.languageNotes: Settings are stored as a flat string KV table; each property maps a string flow to a typed value (toIntOrNull/toBooleanStrictOrNull) with a default, and keys are centralized in a private companion.

nodes.name: RoomSettingsRepository
nodes.summary: Implements SettingsRepository over a SettingsDao KV table, providing observable Flows and suspend setters for ~21 settings with defaults tuned for the Onyx Boox target.

nodes.name: RoomShelfRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Room-backed ShelfRepository for library shelves, encoding multi-source ShelfSource lists into a flat string column and decoding the default content type back to an enum.

nodes.name: RoomShelfRepository
nodes.summary: Implements ShelfRepository over a ShelfDao, mapping ShelfEntity rows to domain Shelf objects using ShelfSourceCodec and ContentType parsing.

nodes.name: ShelfSourceCodec
nodes.summary: Pure object encoding/decoding ShelfSource lists to and from the flat `sourceId=cid1,cid2|...` string format stored in Room.

nodes.name: CredentialStore.kt
nodes.summary: Interface defining secure storage for secrets (API keys and passwords), implemented by Keystore-backed credential stores.

nodes.name: EncryptedCredentialStore.kt
nodes.summary: CredentialStore implementation using EncryptedSharedPreferences (AES256-GCM); recovers from a corrupt keyset by recreating prefs and falls back to RAM-only storage, never writing plaintext secrets to disk.
nodes.languageNotes: Defensive open-with-retry pattern: on keyset corruption it deletes the prefs file and recreates once, then degrades to an in-memory map rather than persisting plaintext.

nodes.name: EncryptedCredentialStore
nodes.summary: Stores API key and password in EncryptedSharedPreferences with a Keystore MasterKey, with resilient open/retry and an in-memory fallback that never persists plaintext.

nodes.name: KeystoreCredentialStore.kt
nodes.summary: Encrypts/decrypts secrets with an AES/GCM AndroidKeyStore key (surviving app updates) and returns persistable CipherBlobs, used by RoomServerRepository to keep credentials across reinstalls.
nodes.languageNotes: The Keystore AES/GCM key is not bound to the APK signature, so encrypted credential blobs survive `adb install -r` / app updates; encrypt returns ciphertext+IV as Base64 CipherBlob.

nodes.name: KeystoreCredentialStore
nodes.summary: Wraps an AndroidKeyStore AES/GCM key to encrypt/decrypt strings into persistable CipherBlobs; also implements CredentialStore via an in-memory buffer since persistence runs through RoomServerRepository.

nodes.name: build.gradle.kts
nodes.summary: Gradle build config for the :domain module: a pure Kotlin JVM/java-library layer with only kotlinx-coroutines, JUnit5/MockK/Turbine test deps, JVM toolchain 21, re-exported by :source-api and :plugin-api.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Gradle version-catalog aliases (libs.*) and the kotlin-jvm + java-library plugins to keep the domain module Android-free.

nodes.name: ColorFilterMatrix.kt
nodes.summary: Pure-Kotlin domain helper that builds a 4x5 ColorMatrix (FloatArray of 20) combining saturation, contrast, and brightness in the 0..255 range, compatible with Compose's ColorMatrix.
nodes.languageNotes: Analytically folds the saturation matrix with contrast/brightness scaling+offset into a single matrix, avoiding chained passes.

nodes.name: buildColorMatrix
nodes.summary: Computes the row-major 4x5 color matrix from Rec.709 luminance weights, applying saturation then folding contrast (pivot 127.5) and linear brightness into the scale and offset terms.

nodes.name: PixelPipeline.kt
nodes.summary: Pure-Kotlin in-place ARGB pixel-processing pipeline for the E-Ink color filter: linear saturation/contrast/brightness, levels+gamma LUT, unsharp mask, and Floyd-Steinberg or ordered dithering.
nodes.languageNotes: Operates directly on packed-ARGB IntArray with bit shifts/masks; dithering and blur kernels are written as plain loops for determinism and Android-independence.

nodes.name: buildGammaLut
nodes.summary: Builds a 256-entry gamma-correction lookup table (out = 255 * (in/255)^(1/gamma)), returning identity when gamma equals 1.

nodes.name: applyPixelPipeline
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full filter pipeline over an ARGB IntArray, skipping neutral stages and dispatching the configured dither mode based on the ColorProfile.

nodes.name: buildToneLut
nodes.summary: Builds a combined 256-entry tone LUT applying black/white-point levels stretching followed by gamma correction.

nodes.name: applyUnsharp
nodes.summary: Applies an unsharp-mask sharpen per channel (out = clamp(in + amount*(in - blur))) using a box-blur copy of the input to avoid in-place feedback.

nodes.name: boxBlur
nodes.summary: Separable box blur over a single-channel array, blurring horizontally then vertically within a configurable radius.

nodes.name: applyFloydSteinberg
nodes.summary: Applies Floyd-Steinberg error-diffusion dithering per channel, quantizing to the configured number of levels and propagating the residual to neighbouring pixels.

nodes.name: applyOrdered
nodes.summary: Applies deterministic ordered (Bayer 4x4) dithering per channel, adding a threshold offset before quantizing to the configured levels.

nodes.name: applyLinear
nodes.summary: Applies the linear saturation/contrast/brightness color matrix (from buildColorMatrix) to each packed-ARGB pixel, clamping channels to 0..255.

nodes.name: EinkController.kt
nodes.summary: Defines Seam B's device-side contract: the EinkController interface plus its value types (RefreshMode, Region, HardwareButton, ButtonEvent, EinkCapabilities) that encapsulate E-Ink refresh, contrast, inversion, and hardware buttons.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure-Kotlin Seam B abstraction; the Boox SDK implementation lives in eink-onyx while a No-Op impl keeps non-Boox dev/test working.

nodes.name: EinkController
nodes.summary: Seam B device interface exposing E-Ink capabilities, a hardware button-event Flow, and region refresh / contrast / inversion controls, implemented by the Onyx and No-Op controllers.

nodes.name: RefreshScheduler.kt
nodes.summary: Pure, device-independent (deprecated) decision logic for E-Ink refresh: chooses PARTIAL while paging and promotes to FULL on forced content change or after a ghost-clear interval, separating the decision from the device-near execution.
nodes.languageNotes: Marked @Deprecated because deviceManagedRefresh (default on) lets the Onyx hardware own full refreshes; retained only as a fallback.

nodes.name: RefreshScheduler
nodes.summary: Per-session E-Ink refresh decider using event counting instead of index modulo, with onContentChange/reset and a companion mergeRegions helper that bounding-boxes dirty regions.

nodes.name: Book.kt
nodes.summary: Source-agnostic domain data model for a book/chapter, carrying sourceId, remoteId, format, page/download state, optional metadata, and server-reported read progress.
nodes.languageNotes: Kotlin data class with default values for optional metadata so each MediaSource can fill only what it has.

nodes.name: BookFormat.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the BookFormat enum distinguishing the supported book container formats in the source-agnostic domain layer.

nodes.name: ColorProfile.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the named E-Ink color-filter profile (saturation/contrast/levels/dither) applied to covers and reader pages, with neutrality flags and value-range constants serving as the single source of truth for clamping.
nodes.languageNotes: Kotlin data class with computed properties (isLinearNeutral/needsPixelPipeline/isNeutral) and a companion object holding the OFF fallback plus SSOT range constants.

nodes.name: ContentType.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ContentType enum describing the kind of content a shelf or series holds, feeding the deterministic viewer-type resolution.

nodes.name: DisplayBehavior.kt
nodes.summary: Models device display behavior on two orthogonal axes (allowsMotion, allowsAccentColor) and derives it from the user display mode, replacing a binary isEink flag to support mono E-Ink, Kaleido, and LCD device classes.
nodes.languageNotes: Top-level function displayBehaviorFor maps DisplayMode to a DisplayBehavior; the EinkCapabilities parameter is intentionally unused after a user-verified design decision.

nodes.name: DisplayMode.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the DisplayMode enum (EINK / SMARTPHONE) representing the user-chosen device-class theme axis.

nodes.name: DitherMode.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the DitherMode enum selecting the dithering algorithm used by the color-filter pixel pipeline.

nodes.name: DownloadState.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the DownloadState enum tracking the offline-download lifecycle of a book.

nodes.name: ReaderPreset.kt
nodes.summary: Defines a named partial snapshot of reader settings (data-only READER_PRESET plugin category) where each nullable override field left unset is preserved on apply.
nodes.languageNotes: All ReaderPresetOverrides fields are nullable so that null means 'not set by the preset', enabling field-level merge on apply.

nodes.name: ReadingDirection.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ReadingDirection enum (e.g. LTR/RTL/vertical) used as source-agnostic series metadata feeding viewer-type resolution.

nodes.name: ReadProgress.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ReadProgress value object holding a book's reading position with a dirty flag for offline-first sync and a locator for EPUB position or comic page index.

nodes.name: RemoteCollection.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the RemoteCollection server-view value object used by the pure collection-sync planner for last-write-wins reconciliation.

nodes.name: Series.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the Series value object carrying source-agnostic metadata (summary, status, genres, reading direction) and a per-series content-type override that any MediaSource fills as far as its backend allows.

nodes.name: Shelf.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the Shelf and ShelfSource value objects representing a user-defined library that bundles selected per-source containers and an optional default content type for viewer fallback.

nodes.name: ShellLayoutMode.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ShellLayoutMode enum (AUTO/COMPACT/EXPANDED) letting the user override the form-factor-derived shell layout, orthogonal to the device-class display mode.

nodes.name: SourceKind.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the SourceKind enum identifying the backend kind of a media source (e.g. KOMGA, OPDS, PLUGIN) used by the source-registration wiring.

nodes.name: ThemeSpec.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the fully declarative theme descriptor (ThemeSpec, ColorRolesSpec, TypoSpec) for an external UI pack using only primitives, keeping domain/data free of Compose/ui-api types.
nodes.languageNotes: Three nested data classes carry only hex-string/Int/Float primitives so the spec stays pure; translation to ColorScheme/Shapes happens only in the :app module.

nodes.name: UiPackSpec.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the UiPackSpec descriptor for an externally installable data-only UI pack (shell nav style, icon remap, accent, corner radius, theme), all primitives with each section optional and falling back to host defaults.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure-primitive data class with a hasAnyOverride computed property; conversion to ui-api/Compose types is confined to :app to keep domain pure.

nodes.name: UserCollection.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the canonical cross-source collection model (UserCollection plus CollectionKind, SyncStatus, CollectionMember) keyed by name with an ordered member list owned by the app.

nodes.name: ViewerType.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the ViewerType enum (paged/webtoon/comic/novel) that the deterministic viewer-resolution rule selects to pick the reading mode.

nodes.name: WebtoonStrip.kt
nodes.summary: Provides the pure WebtoonStrip model that maps a global continuous page index across multiple chapters to (chapter, page-in-chapter) and back, enabling chapter-accurate progress during seamless webtoon scrolling.
nodes.languageNotes: Precomputes a prefix-sum of chapter starts in an IntArray and clamps out-of-range indices; pure with no I/O for easy unit testing.

nodes.name: Document.kt
nodes.summary: Declares render seam B: the engine-neutral Document/DocumentFactory and ReflowableDocument/ReflowableDocumentFactory interfaces plus supporting value objects, decoupling readers/UI from MuPDF or crengine implementations.
nodes.languageNotes: Android-free RenderedPage overrides equals/hashCode for IntArray content equality; ReflowableDocument extends Document with default-method title()/authors() returning empty strings.

nodes.name: NovelFont.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the NovelFont descriptor and the NovelFonts registry of bundled reading fonts, serving as the single source of truth for the font picker UI and the engine's FreeType family-name binding.
nodes.languageNotes: NovelFonts is a Kotlin object (singleton) exposing an ordered ALL list, a DEFAULT family, and a byFamily lookup with fallback.

nodes.name: NovelSettings.kt
nodes.summary: Defines persisted novel typography as pure primitives and the pure toReflowConfig mapper to the engine-neutral ReflowConfig, with companion constants (SSOT for margins, font weight/size, line height) clamped to crengine-permitted values.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure mapper toReflowConfig with companion-object SSOT constants and a marginFor lookup whose px values must match crengine-ng's permitted list to avoid silent reset to default.

nodes.name: ReflowConfig.kt
nodes.summary: Defines the engine-neutral reflow typography config (ReflowConfig) plus its supporting types TextAlign, Hyphenation (sealed), and Margins, consumed by the reflow engine behind render seam B.
nodes.languageNotes: Hyphenation is a sealed interface with an Off data object and a Language data class; companion DEFAULT constants provide reusable neutral instances.

nodes.name: CollectionRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Declares the CollectionRepository interface (the app-side source of truth for cross-source collections) and the CollectionSyncLink per-source sync-state record, including title healing and source-removal cleanup.
nodes.languageNotes: Repository interface exposes reactive Flow streams plus suspend CRUD/sync operations; CollectionSyncLink timestamps are UTC epoch millis.

nodes.name: ColorProfile
nodes.summary: Named E-Ink color-filter profile holding linear and pixel-pipeline parameters, with neutrality-check computed properties and a companion OFF fallback plus SSOT clamp range constants.

nodes.name: WebtoonStrip
nodes.summary: Pure model of a continuous multi-chapter webtoon strip that converts between a global page index and (chapter, page-in-chapter), clamping out-of-range indices and skipping zero-page chapters.

nodes.name: Document
nodes.summary: Render seam B interface exposing page count, page size, and scaled/rotated page rendering across all formats (cbz/cbr/pdf/EPUB), implemented by the MuPDF wrapper.

nodes.name: ReflowableDocument
nodes.summary: Engine-neutral interface for reflowable (novel) documents: re-layout via applyLayout, table of contents, stable anchors, progress seeking, and full-text search, allowing the concrete EPUB engine to live behind the seam.

nodes.name: NovelSettings
nodes.summary: Persisted novel typography as primitives with a pure toReflowConfig mapper and a companion object of SSOT constants and a margin-preset lookup constrained to crengine-permitted px values.

nodes.name: CollectionRepository
nodes.summary: Repository interface for cross-source user collections exposing reactive collection/sync-link Flows and suspend operations for CRUD, membership, title healing, sync-link writeback, and per-source cleanup on server removal.

nodes.name: ColorProfileRepository.kt
nodes.summary: Domain repository interface for managing E-Ink colour-filter profiles, exposing reactive Flows of all profiles and the active profile plus upsert/delete/setActive operations including plugin-package cleanup.

nodes.name: DownloadRepository.kt
